productDisplayName: Maxima Ssteele Men Brown Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a rectangular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Brown dial, silver toned hands with cut-out detail and white inlays, a silver toned seconds hand with white inlay, white and silver toned markings, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap style: Brown, textured leather strap with contrast stitch detailing, secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Maxima Ssteele caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
